citation.article_title: One year of high-precision operational data including measurement uncertainties from a large-scale solar thermal collector array with flat plate collectors, located in Graz, Austria
citation.author: Tschopp
citation.unstructured_citation: Tschopp, D., Ohnewein, P., Stelzer, R., Feierl, L., Hamilton-Jones, M., Moser, M., & Holter, C. (2023). One year of high-precision operational data including measurement uncertainties from a large-scale solar thermal collector array with flat plate collectors, located in Graz, Austria. Data in Brief, 48, 109224. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.dib.2023.109224

citation.unstructured_citation: International Organization for Standardization. (2022). ISO 24194 Solar energy - Collector fields - Check of performance [Standard].

citation.article_title: ISO 9806 Solar energy - Solar thermal collectors - Test methods

citation.unstructured_citation: International Organization for Standardization. (2025). ISO 9806 Solar energy - Solar thermal collectors - Test methods [Standard].

citation.article_title: Dynamic Collector Array Test (D-CAT). Final report FFG project 848766 - MeQuSo. Development of methods for quality assessment of large-scale solar thermal plants under real operating conditions.
citation.author: Ohnewein
citation.unstructured_citation: Ohnewein, P., Tschopp, D., Hausner, R., & Doll, W. (2020). Dynamic Collector Array Test (D-CAT). Final report FFG project 848766 - MeQuSo. Development of methods for quality assessment of large-scale solar thermal plants under real operating conditions. AEE INTEC. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7615252

citation.article_title: Large-scale solar thermal systems in leading countries: A review and comparative study of Denmark, China, Germany and Austria
citation.author: Tschopp
citation.unstructured_citation: Tschopp, D., Tian, Z., Berberich, M., Fan, J., Perers, B., & Furbo, S. (2020). Large-scale solar thermal systems in leading countries: A review and comparative study of Denmark, China, Germany and Austria. Applied Energy, 270, 114997. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2020.114997

citation.article_title: Guide to ISO 24194:2022 Power Check - procedure for checking the power performance of solar thermal collector fields

citation.article_title: SunPeek open-source software for ISO 24194 performance assessment and monitoring of large-scale solar thermal plants
citation.author: Tschopp
citation.unstructured_citation: Tschopp, D., Ohnewein, P., Hamilton-Jones, M., Zauner, P., Feierl, L., Moser, M., Zellinger, M., Kloibhofer, C., Koren, M., Mehnert, S., Duret, A., Jobard, X., Pauletta, S., Giovannetti, F., & Schiebler, B. (2024). SunPeek open-source software for ISO 24194 performance assessment and monitoring of large-scale solar thermal plants. International Sustainable Energy Conference - Proceedings, 1. https://doi.org/10.52825/isec.v1i.1248

citation.volume_title: Digital tools for solar thermal plant monitoring. A handbook for plant operators and associated stakeholders. Version 1.0 (June 2024)
citation.author: Tschopp
citation.unstructured_citation: Tschopp, D., Ohnewein, P., Feierl, L., & Hamilton-Jones, M. (2024). Digital tools for solar thermal plant monitoring. A handbook for plant operators and associated stakeholders. Version 1.0 (June 2024). DIH Süd. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.12523699

citation.author: Anderson
